goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'ely' and should leave on 'thursday'.
The train should 'leave after 14:15' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'new zealand' food and should be in the 'north'.
The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'asian oriental' food.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to ely and should leave on thursday
The train should leave after 14:15 and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve new zealand food and should be in the north
The restaurant should be in the expensive price range
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves asian oriental food
